The '''''Wolf-Pack''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that was part of the [[Lumiya's fleet|fleet]] of [[Lumiya]] shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire" />

==Appearances==
*{{GalaxyCite|3|Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire}}
